examples: He addressed the crowd outside the window
The chairman addressed the board of trustees

meanings.definition: address or apply oneself to something, direct one's efforts towards something, such as a question
greet, as with a prescribed form, title, or name
examples: She calls him by first name

meanings.definition: act on verbally or in some form of artistic expression
examples: The course covered all of Western Civilization
The new book treats the history of China

meanings.definition: adjust and aim (a golf ball) at in preparation of hitting

examples: I throw away all mail addressed to `resident'
